data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a technical issue protocol, specifically regarding lost connections. However, while the linked use case mentions that the candidate rejoins after a connection loss and that the proctor verifies identity again, there is no concrete evidence or API reads provided that confirm the implementation of a formal protocol for handling such technical issues. This lack of specific evidence leads to a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of a defined technical issue protocol for lost connections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define technical issue protocol
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and details of the technical issue protocol for lost connections.
